eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 02:20 PM ON MAY 8, 2026 Effective until 10:20 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mesa Police Department is looking foris looking for 70 year old Terry Dominice. Terry is a white male 5 feet 1 inches tall, 97 pounds, wearing a blue t-shirt with We Need Christ across the chest and khaki pants. Terry was last seen on foot in the area of Country Club and Rio Salado Parkway. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
